Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION
REFERRED TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION
REPORTED AND COMMITTED TO WOMEN'S ISSUES

Title: Prohibits the use of restraints and force against incarcerated individuals during labor and after other pregnancy outcomes absent extraordinary circumstances and on pregnant persons during custodial interrogation
Summary: Prohibits the use of restraints on and the use of force against incarcerated individuals during labor and incarcerated individuals who have experienced different pregnancy outcomes, absent extraordinary circumstances, and on pregnant and post-pregnancy persons during a custodial interrogation.
LawCode: Amd §611, Cor L; add §837-t-1, Exec L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the correction law and the executive law, in relation to prohibiting the use of restraints on incarcerated individuals during labor, absent extraordinary circumstances, and on pregnant persons during a custodial interrogation
